'''織田井戸遺跡'''（おだいどいせき）は、[[愛知県]][[小牧市]]にある[[縄文時代|縄文]]・[[弥生時代]]の[[遺跡]]。
==概要== [[小牧市]]西南部にある[[縄文時代|縄文]]・[[弥生時代]]の[[遺跡]]。[[1981年]]に本格的な調査が行なわれ、多数の遺物が出土している。
==歴史== *[[1981年]]（[[昭和]]56年） - [[小牧市]]による本格調査実施
==所在地== [[愛知県]][[小牧市]]大字小木字織田井戸地内
==関連書籍== ※『書名』[[著作者|著者]]・編集者（[[出版社]]・出版元、出版年）
*『織田井戸遺跡発掘調査報告書』[[小牧市]][[教育委員会]]/編（小牧市教育委員会、[[1983年]]）
'''参考文献''' *『愛知県小牧市織田井戸遺跡発掘調査報告書』小牧市教育委員会/編（小牧市教育委員会、1983年）
[[Category:愛知県の歴史|おたいといせき]] [[Category:小牧市|おたいといせき]]

revision.text:
{{Citation needed|date=November 2024}} [[File:Aichi prefectural road No.451.JPG|thumb|right|250px|The area where the Odaito Site once existed. The road in the foreground is Aichi Prefectural Route 451 (Nagoya Outer Ring Road) in Komaki City, Koki.]] '''Odaito Site''' (織田井戸遺跡, ''Odaito Iseki'') was an [[archaeological site]] from the [[Jōmon period]] to the [[Yayoi period]], located in Koki, [[Komaki City]], [[Aichi Prefecture]], Japan. A full-scale investigation was conducted in [[1981]], uncovering numerous artifacts. The site is now occupied by [[Aichi Prefectural Route 451]].
== History ==
* [[1981]] ([[Shōwa]] 56) - A full-scale investigation was carried out by Komaki City.
== Location ==
1- and 2-chome, Koki, Komaki City, Aichi Prefecture (Aichi Prefectural Route 451, Nagoya Outer Ring Road)

The road in the foreground is Aichi Prefectural Route 451 (Nagoya Outer Ring Road) in Komaki City, Koki.]] '''Odaito Site''' (織田井戸遺跡, ''Odaito Iseki'') was an [[archaeological site]] from the [[Jōmon period]] to the [[Yayoi period]], located in Koki, [[Komaki City]], [[Aichi Prefecture]], Japan. A full-scale investigation was conducted in [[1981]], uncovering numerous artifacts. The site is now occupied by [[Aichi Prefectural Route 451]].
== History ==
* [[1981]] ([[Shōwa]] 56) - A full-scale investigation was carried out by Komaki City.
== Location ==
1- and 2-chome, Koki, Komaki City, Aichi Prefecture (Aichi Prefectural Route 451, Nagoya Outer Ring Road)
== Related Books == * ''Odaito Site Excavation Report'' edited by Komaki City [[Board of Education]] (Published by Komaki City Board of Education, [[1983]]) * ''Excavation Report on the Odaito Site in Komaki City, Aichi Prefecture'' edited by Komaki City Board of Education (Published by Komaki City Board of Education, 1983)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Koki Burial Mounds|ja|小木古墳群}} - A group of [[kofun]] from the [[Kofun period]] in the same area.

revision.text:
{{出典の明記| date = 2024年11月}} [[File:Aichi prefectural road No.451.JPG|thumb|right|250px|かつて織田井戸遺跡があった辺り。目の前の道路は愛知県道451号名古屋外環状線（小牧市小木）。]] '''織田井戸遺跡'''（おだいどいせき）は、かつて[[愛知県]][[小牧市]]小木にあった、[[縄文時代]]から[[弥生時代]]にかけての[[遺跡]]である。[[1981年]]に本格的な調査が行なわれ、多数の遺物が出土している。現在遺跡があった場所は、[[愛知県道451号名古屋外環状線]]となっている。
==歴史== *[[1981年]]（[[昭和]]56年） - 小牧市による本格調査実施
==所在地== 愛知県小牧市小木1・2丁目 愛知県道451号名古屋外環状線
==関連書籍== <!--※『書名』[[著作者|著者]]・編集者（[[出版社]]・出版元、出版年）--> *『織田井戸遺跡発掘調査報告書』小牧市[[教育委員会]]/編（小牧市教育委員会、[[1983年]]） *『愛知県小牧市織田井戸遺跡発掘調査報告書』小牧市教育委員会/編（小牧市教育委員会、1983年）
==関連項目== *[[小木古墳群]] - 同じ地区にある[[古墳時代]]の[[古墳]]群。
{{DEFAULTSORT:おたいといせき}} [[Category:縄文時代の遺跡]] [[Category:弥生時代の遺跡]] [[Category:愛知県の考古遺跡]] [[Category:小牧市の歴史]]

The road in the foreground is Aichi Prefectural Route 451 (Nagoya Outer Ring Road) in Komaki City, Koki.]] '''Odaito Site''' (織田井戸遺跡, ''Odaito Iseki'') was an {{ill|Archaeological site|en|Archaeological site|WD=Q839954|lt=Archaeological site}} from the [[Jōmon period]] to the {{ill|Yayoi period|en|Yayoi period|WD=Q207858|lt=Yayoi period}}, located in Koki, [[Komaki City]], {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}, Japan. A full-scale investigation was conducted in {{ill|1981|en|1981|WD=Q2437|lt=1981}}, uncovering numerous artifacts. The site is now occupied by [[Aichi Prefectural Route 451]].
== History ==
* {{ill|1981|en|1981|WD=Q2437|lt=1981}} ({{ill|Shōwa|en|Shōwa|WD=Q398996|lt=Shōwa}} 56) - A full-scale investigation was carried out by Komaki City.
== Location ==
1- and 2-chome, Koki, Komaki City, Aichi Prefecture (Aichi Prefectural Route 451, Nagoya Outer Ring Road)
== Related Books == * ''Odaito Site Excavation Report'' edited by Komaki City [[:en:Board of Education|Board of Education]] (Published by Komaki City Board of Education, {{ill|1983|en|1983|WD=Q2434|lt=1983}}) * ''Excavation Report on the Odaito Site in Komaki City, Aichi Prefecture'' edited by Komaki City Board of Education (Published by Komaki City Board of Education, 1983) == See Also == * {{ill|Koki Kofun Cluster|ja|小木古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koki Kofuns|qq=}} - A group of [[kofun]] from the [[Kofun period]] in the same area. {{translated page|ja|織田井戸遺跡|version=102630575|comment=Imported full ja history}}
